leetcode.description: Regularly participates in LeetCode contests and solves algorithmic problems covering data structures, algorithms, dynamic programming, graphs, trees, and system design fundamentals.

codeforces.description: Actively participates in Codeforces contests and continuously improves problem-solving skills.

jeeAdvanced.description: Qualified JEE Advanced with an All India Rank of 8585.

college.description: Maintaining a strong academic record at NIT Kurukshetra.

technicalAchievements.title: Backend Development
technicalAchievements.description: Built scalable backend applications using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Redis, BullMQ, and JWT authentication.

technicalAchievements.description: Developed machine learning projects using Python, OpenCV, NumPy, Pandas, and Scikit-learn.

summary: Competitive programmer with strong performance across LeetCode, Codeforces, and CodeChef. Qualified JEE Advanced, secured 99.5 percentile in JEE Main, and maintains an excellent academic record while building scalable backend systems and AI-powered applications.
